ddls:
CREATE TABLE "decades" (
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decade */,
  "decade_start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the decade (e.g., 1900, 1910) */,
  "decade_end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the decade (e.g., 1909, 1919) */,
  "decade_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the decade */,
  "decade_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the decade */,
  "decade_fertility_rate" REAL /* Average fertility rate for the decade */,
  "decade_life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy for the decade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 70-79) */,
  "age_group_start" INTEGER /* Starting age of the group */,
  "age_group_end" INTEGER /* Ending age of the group */,
  "age_group_midpoint" REAL /* Midpoint of the age group */,
  "age_group_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the decade */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population count */,
  "normalized_population" REAL /* Normalized population percentage */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate for the specific age group and gender in the decade */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate for the specific age group and gender in the decade */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Migration rate for the specific age group and gender in the decade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_decade_id FOREIGN KEY ("decade_id") REFERENCES decades ("decade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES gender ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Census Bureau, Historical Records) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the data source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability rating of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_transformations" (
  "transformation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transformation */,
  "transformation_name" TEXT /* Name of the transformation (e.g., Normalization, Aggregation) */,
  "transformation_description" TEXT /* Description of the transformation */,
  "transformation_date" TEXT /* Date when the transformation was applied */,
  "transformation_script" TEXT /* Script or method used for the transformation */,
  "transformation_author" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who performed the transformation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "transformation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transformation applied */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data entry */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_transformation_id FOREIGN KEY ("transformation_id") REFERENCES data_transformations ("transformation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "user_contact" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "data_ids" TEXT /* Array of data IDs included in the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the report */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was shared */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "share_status" TEXT /* Status of the share */,
  "share_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the share link expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)
